summary: Sprint 3 ThookAI Agent Council Core testing. All 15 backend API tests passed. Full pipeline completes in ~24 seconds (well within 90s target). Frontend Content Studio UI fully functional with all agent cards, QC scores, action buttons working correctly.

issues: Missing data-testid on QC scores section (no testid on the quality scores container div). Currently only 'qc-overall-badge' is testable.
content-draft-card exists but no data-testid='content-draft' (text content is 'content-text', card is 'content-draft-card')
Edit textarea testid is 'content-edit-textarea' not 'edit-textarea' - minor naming inconsistency vs PRD

verified_features: POST /api/content/create returns job_id + status=running for valid linkedin/post
POST /api/content/create returns 400 for input < 5 chars
POST /api/content/create returns 400 for invalid content_type for platform (e.g. tweet for linkedin)
GET /api/content/job/{job_id} returns current pipeline status with agent_summaries
GET /api/content/job/{job_id} returns 404 for non-existent job
Reference job job_307f39714a52 has status=reviewing, final_content, qc_score with personaMatch/aiRisk/platformFit
All 5 agent_summaries present (commander/scout/thinker/writer/qc)
PATCH /api/content/job/{job_id}/status with status=approved updates job, edited_content persists
GET /api/content/jobs returns list with agent_outputs excluded
GET /api/content/platform-types returns correct platform→content_type mapping
Full pipeline for linkedin/post completes in ~24 seconds with final_content + qc_score
Content Studio loads at /dashboard/studio
LinkedIn/X/Instagram platform tabs switch correctly and update content type options
LinkedIn shows Post/Carousel, X shows Tweet/Thread
Textarea accepts input and shows character count
Generate button shows 'Agents at work...' state + spinner during generation
Agent pipeline cards (Commander/Scout/Thinker/Writer/QC) display with status (waiting/running/done) via data-testid agent-{key}
After pipeline completes: QC scores (Persona Match/AI Risk/Platform Fit) display with color-coded bars
Content draft text appears in output panel with platform header and word count
Edit button toggles editing mode (content-edit-textarea appears on click on content area)
Approve button saves content and shows approved-banner with lime check
Regenerate and Discard buttons present and visible in action bar
action_items: Consider adding data-testid='qc-scores' to the QC scores container in ContentOutput.jsx for testability
Scout agent is MOCKED (Perplexity placeholder) - all other agents (Commander/Thinker/Writer/QC) use real AI
critical_code_review_comments: ContentOutput.jsx: QC scores section has no testid wrapper - only 'qc-overall-badge' badge is testable
ContentOutput.jsx: ScoutResearch section renders job.agent_outputs?.scout from job data - this field is excluded from GET /jobs list endpoint but present in GET /job/{id} response, which is correct
pipeline.py: No timeout guard on individual AI agent calls - if Writer (Claude) hangs, entire pipeline will stall. Consider per-agent asyncio.wait_for() with timeout
content.py: GET /jobs excludes agent_outputs (correct, reduces payload) but also excludes _id (correct)

success_rate.frontend: 95% - all major flows verified, minor missing testid attributes

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing test user (test@thook.ai) and reference job job_307f39714a52
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint 3 fully tested. All 5 agent cards (Commander/Scout/Thinker/Writer/QC) working. Pipeline completes in ~24s. Scout agent is MOCKED. Session token test_session_sprint2_1773805008345 is valid for test@thook.ai. Reference job job_307f39714a52 was modified to approved status with edited_content='My edited content for testing purposes' during testing.
mocked_apis: Scout Agent (Perplexity) returns mock research data - all other agents use real AI via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY
